description: Fresh seed of the current live coherent quote engine with the passive recapture micro-lift and calm-divergence release.
label: baseline-live

change_summary: Layer a calm-mode release overlay onto the current coherent quote engine without changing the main toxic-side mapping.
decision_summary: delta 0.228558 did not clear promotion margin 18.136433
description: Add a narrow nonlinear calm gate using volatility, hazard, flow pressure, and spot-jump stress to release passive-side edge and a tiny calm shared rebate only in quiet conditions.
label: calm-quiet-gate-v2

change_summary: Replace the coarse calm divergence threshold with a continuous quiet-gated divergence release on top of the calm-mode overlay.
decision_summary: delta 0.276967 did not clear promotion margin 18.136500
description: Refine the calm overlay by gating the divergence bonus with the same continuous quiet signal instead of a hard calm threshold.
label: calm-quiet-gate-v3

change_summary: Raise the calm shared rebate coefficient inside the quiet-gated overlay while leaving the rest of the calm release map unchanged.
decision_summary: delta 0.287189 did not clear promotion margin 18.136095
description: Increase the calm shared rebate slightly while keeping the continuous quiet-gated passive release overlay unchanged.
label: calm-quiet-gate-v4

change_summary: Apply a narrow quiet-state discount to the common hazard component used in side-risk pricing, without changing the rest of the calm overlay.
decision_summary: delta 0.336695 did not clear promotion margin 18.127014
description: Add a very small quiet-gated discount to the common hazard component inside side-risk pricing after longer gaps, on top of the current calm overlay.
label: quiet-risk-discount-v1

change_summary: Add a small quiet-gated compression on shared observation carry on top of the retained quiet-risk discount overlay.
decision_summary: delta 0.335170 did not clear promotion margin 18.130828
description: Stack the narrow quiet-state hazard discount with a tiny quiet-gated compression on shared observation carry after longer gaps.
label: quiet-risk-plus-shared-carry-v1

change_summary: Apply quiet-state latent recentering upstream in state dynamics while leaving the fee map unchanged from the restored incumbent.
decision_summary: delta 5.458157 did not clear promotion margin 17.798347
description: Add quiet-gated latent-spot recentering after longer quiet gaps, with no extra bleed on divergence, flow pressure, or hazard memories.
label: quiet-latent-recenter-v2

change_summary: Combine quiet-state latent recentering with a small quiet hazard discount in side-risk pricing.
decision_summary: delta 5.441085 did not clear promotion margin 17.793784
description: Layer a narrow quiet-gated hazard discount onto the quiet latent recentering family after longer gaps.
label: quiet-latent-recenter-plus-risk-v1

change_summary: Probe a slightly weaker quiet-state latent recentering rate after the stronger and stacked variants underperformed.
decision_summary: delta 5.508883 did not clear promotion margin 17.799965
description: Reduce the quiet-gated latent recentering strength slightly on both medium and long gaps while keeping the idea state-only.
label: quiet-latent-recenter-v4

change_summary: Take one more small step down the quiet-state latent recentering rate after the weaker setting improved raw edge.
decision_summary: delta 5.598549 did not clear promotion margin 17.804820
description: Reduce the quiet-gated latent recentering strength another small step while keeping the idea state-only.
label: quiet-latent-recenter-v5

change_summary: Take a final small step down the quiet-state latent recentering rate before the line reaches the next pivot threshold.
decision_summary: delta 5.597070 did not clear promotion margin 17.834203
description: Reduce the quiet-gated latent recentering strength one more small step while keeping the idea state-only.
label: quiet-latent-recenter-v6
